pages.title: Home
pages.subtitle: Software Agency
pages.content: Transforming ideas into powerful digital solutions. We craft innovative software, stunning interfaces, and scalable systems that drive business growth.

pages.title: About Us
pages.subtitle: About Us
pages.content: At Helmstrat, we believe in building more than just software – we build partnerships. Our team of passionate developers, designers, and strategists work together to deliver solutions that make an impact.
pages.fullContent: From startups to enterprises, we adapt to your needs and deliver results that exceed expectations. Our commitment to quality, transparency, and innovation sets us apart.

pages.title: Services
pages.subtitle: What We Do
pages.content: Comprehensive digital solutions tailored to your unique needs. We bring your vision to life with precision and care.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Custom websites and web applications built with modern frameworks. From landing pages to complex enterprise systems.

services.title: Mobile Apps
services.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android. User-centric design meets powerful functionality.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: Beautiful, intuitive interfaces that users love. Research-driven design that converts and delights.

services.title: Cloud Solutions
services.description: Scalable cloud infrastructure and migration services. AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud expertise.

services.title: Backend & APIs
services.description: Robust server-side solutions, RESTful APIs, and database architecture. Secure, scalable, and optimized.

services.title: Quality Assurance
services.description: Comprehensive testing services to ensure your software is bulletproof. Performance, security, and functionality.

pages.title: Testimonials
pages.subtitle: Testimonials
pages.content: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what our partners have to say about working with Helmstrat.

testimonials.name: Sarah Ahmed
testimonials.text: Helmstrat transformed our outdated system into a modern, efficient platform. Their attention to detail and commitment to quality is unmatched. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Michael Khan
testimonials.text: The mobile app they built for us exceeded all expectations. Professional, responsive, and truly understood our vision. Our user engagement increased by 200%!

testimonials.name: Fatima Ali
testimonials.text: Working with Helmstrat was a game-changer. Their team's expertise in cloud architecture saved us time and money. They deliver on their promises, every time.

pages.title: Contact
pages.subtitle: Get In Touch
pages.content: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Send us a message and let's discuss how we can help bring your vision to life.

pages.title: Our Products
pages.subtitle: Our Products
pages.content: Explore our suite of innovative digital products designed to simplify your life and boost your productivity.

products.name: Desi Recipes
products.description: Discover the rich flavors of Pakistani and Indian cuisine with our comprehensive recipe app. From traditional biryanis to delicious desserts, explore hundreds of authentic recipes with step-by-step instructions, beautiful images, and cooking tips.

products.name: Helmstrat CMS
products.description: A powerful yet simple do-it-yourself content management system built with Node.js and Express. Manage your website content, pages, products, and blog posts without any coding knowledge. Features include dynamic pages, products management, blog system, navigation editor, and email integration.
